name: I Hope This Hurts || 2000 Follower Special!
description:
|| You're the 6th Member of the Tulpar ||

HEAVY Spoilers for the Game Mouthwashing

You're a crew member on a transport ship floating through space and working for a company that could care less about you. You've noticed that there's been a shift in some of your crew mates, but you're not sure what is going on. A dreadful feeling has come over you. Something is bound to happen, but what exactly?

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I may or may not have played Mouthwashing last night and am currently obsessed. What an amazing game. If you haven't played it, I highly recommend it. It's an inexpensive indie game that will only take you 3 hours to play. You can find it on Steam. The beautiful artwork is by Borcheim on Newgrounds.

Also,,, 2000 followers? Guys, this is amazing! Thank you so much. You all are the best.

And.. Want to make a bot request??? You can make them here. And think about joining my Discord server. It’s very active and I love interacting with followers!

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
